templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Please allow 3-5 business days to process your refund after the item is received by our Returns Department.

templates.name: Can you wash squish mellows?
templates.content: Absolutely! We recommend placing the Squishmallow in the washer with your normal laundry detergent in cold water and a gentle setting to wash it. You can find details on this here: https://toynk.attn.tv/sl/oHc_iJHz

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Here's a quick link to our in-character size chart for your reference: https://www.toynk.com/pages/incharacter-size-chart If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Tax Exemption
templates.content: You can send a copy of your tax-exempt certificate to help@toynk.com. Our team's happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders within the contiguous U.S.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/toynktoys/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/ToynkToys/

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://www.toynk.com/pages/affiliate-program

templates.name: Wholesale inquires
templates.content: We don't offer wholesale at this time, my apologies.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@toynk.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.toynk.com/pages/return-policy

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our shipping time takes 5-7 business days, depending on the method you choose at checkout. You can check out our complete shipping timeframes here: https://www.toynk.com/pages/shipping-page-2

templates.name: Do you offer exchanges?
templates.content: If you intend to get another item we do not process/offer direct exchanges. Please return the original order for a refund and place a new order for the item you would like to receive instead. This is the fastest way to receive your new item.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://toynk.happyreturns.com/

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We ship from Gilberts, Illinois.

templates.name: Where are you located?
templates.content: We're located in Chicago, IL.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. You can join by creating an account here: https://www.toynk.com/account/register

templates.name: Price adjustment / pricematch
templates.content: We strive to provide the lowest prices on the internet. Since our listings are very competitive, we don't offer any type of discounts or bids on this item. In addition, we're not participating in any price matching at this time. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Code won't work
templates.content: Certain products and collections are excluded from promotional discounts. These exclusions include, but are not limited to, Geeki Tikis, Currency Series Trading Cards, and the XBox Series X Replica Mini Fridge. You can also read our Terms and Conditions here regarding our promotional discount exclusions: https://toynk.attn.tv/sl/CUP-OhvS

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.toynk.com/collections/buy-three-get-one-free

templates.name: How do I redeem my points/tokens?
templates.content: Please click the rewards widget at the bottom right of our website to redeem your rewards.
